reviews.school_name: UBIKA - A Preschool, Daycare & Activity Centre - Sector 77
reviews.author: Pritish Debsharma
reviews.review_body: Ubika is pioneering a novel educational approach centered around sustainability and nature-based learning, instilling in young minds the profound significance of our natural world from an early age. I deeply appreciate the dedicated efforts of the entire team.

reviews.school_name: UBIKA - A Preschool, Daycare & Activity Centre - Sector 77
reviews.author: KRamesh Rao
reviews.review_body: I've heard about Ubika's unique proposition for early education and their nomination for the India School Award. Wishing the team all the best on this remarkable journey!

reviews.school_name: UBIKA - A Preschool, Daycare & Activity Centre - Sector 77
reviews.author: Jyoti Arora
reviews.review_body: Ubika is different world lots of difference from others in all aspects with sustainable with maximum of wooden amenities around talking about the curriculum is really friendly basis lastly will talk nature based decorum which has there on story of values in life

reviews.school_name: UBIKA - A Preschool, Daycare & Activity Centre - Sector 77
reviews.author: Tanu Namdev
reviews.review_body:
UBIKA is a sustainable nature base school, I had a really great experience visiting there, innovative activities and a lot of new learning exposure for children in early childhood.
Stimulating young minds giving them a lot of sensory exposure that’ll help in their holistic development.

reviews.school_name: UBIKA - A Preschool, Daycare & Activity Centre - Sector 77
reviews.author: Nikhil Arora
reviews.review_body: I recently enrolled my child in this preschool for the upcoming session, and I couldn't be happier with the experience. The staff is incredibly caring and dedicated, creating a warm and nurturing environment. The curriculum is thoughtfully designed, focusing on both academic and social development. The facilities are clean, safe, and stimulating for young minds. I highly recommend this preschool to any parent looking for high-quality early education for their child.
